title: InSituVane
description: InSituVane: A representation of an in-situ vane test defined by the borehole where the test was carried out and the result.

Id.description: Location identifier relating the borehole to the test (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: Depth to the top of the sample, measured from the top of the borehole (IVAN_DEPTH). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Properties.description: A list of different properties including references, tests, analysis, results and detection.

Result.description: Vane Test Result (IVAN_IVAN). Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
